reference: I am nine weeks pregnant. In the past few weeks, I have been experiencing vision problems where I can see, but things are not focused, leaving me feeling off. I don’t know if it matters, but my neck is stiff and sore. When the vision problems start, a little later, I get headaches. Earlier today, when it happened, I went to get something to eat, hoping that would make me feel better. When I was asked if I needed sauces, I could not think of ketchup. I don't like how I feel when this happens and I am scared of what could be the problem.
text: And then when they tied the shoes, they tied them together and the feet together.
